texts.text: Swap unlocked gear to shift your battle profile.
Your current climb, gold, and passive rewards.
Claim daily income and floor progress rewards.
Climb floors, tune your build, and keep the run alive.
Spend gold on permanent combat growth.

texts.name: BattleScreenSubtitle
texts.text: Read the floor, time your skills, and finish the duel.

texts.name: SkillBarHint
texts.text: Buttons dim during cooldown and light back up when ready.

texts.name: PlayerFrameHint
texts.text: Crit and drain thrive when your upgrades are online.

texts.name: EnemyFrameHint
texts.text: Higher floors push HP, damage, and reward values upward.
